text: AtomicAssets on WAX is pure magic. Collection → Schema → Template → Asset. Your Pixals live at template 781515. Here’s exactly how the on-chain data flows (and why it’s so cheap & verifiable). 🕹️
Hot or Not pairing is 100% on-chain verifiable. We use the TX memo + block header as the seed. No oracle. No RAM cost. No trust required. Here’s the exact pattern we use in Px Hot or Not.
